issues.description: Action type 'ForceDiscard' is incorrect. Card effect states opponent 'returns all cards in their hand to their deck and shuffles' — this is ReturnToHand, not ForceDiscard (which typically means discard to trash). The count of 999 is also a workaround; should use a proper mechanic for 'all cards in hand'.
Missing target specification. Both actions (return hand + draw) should target 'opponent' explicitly via a target field.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Your opponent returns all cards in their hand to their deck and shuffles their deck. Then, your opponent draws 5 cards.
